summary: Antonelli's Friday pace thrust Mercedes into contention at a heat-ravaged Red Bull Ring, challenging McLaren's Piastri for outright speed supremacy in qualifying trim. Gasly's controversial podium finish from the last round looms over strategic decisions, with teams weighing aggressive pit-stop calls against the brutal ambient temperatures set to test tire management and driver endurance. A dominant performance here would shift the championship momentum decisively, as consistent front-running finishes become the currency separating contenders in the season's decisive phase.
